baseline.notes: Run 38b F1 0.392. Run 41 attempted aggressive prompt tightening and regressed to F1 0.271 because broad changes spilled into non-targeted event types (catch 5→0, goal 3→0, throw_in 20→9, goal_kick 14→3). BUT the targeted tightening on free_kick_shot (FPs 30→3) and shot_stop_diving (FPs 17→8) worked exactly as designed. Run 42 keeps only the targeted tightening; reverts the broad changes.

targets.notes: Modest targets reflecting what Run 41's targeted tightening actually delivered, minus a partial rebound from reverting the broad changes. Expect free_kick_shot and shot_stop_diving to retain most of their Run 41 FP wins; other types to rebound toward Run 38b recall levels. F1 0.41 = +0.018 over baseline — first real ceiling break.

notes: Run #42 — surgical VLM prompt tightening (retry). Commit 8def8b5 keeps ONLY the targeted REQUIRES clauses for free_kick_shot (wall/foul context required) and shot_stop_diving (shot+dive+deflection required). Reverts the broader 'conservative is better' framing and restored the aggressive-emission language for throw_in / goal_kick / catch. Added clarifying NOTE that the 'if in doubt emit' policy is SCOPED to those three types — not a relaxation of the REQUIRES clauses. Same gate config as Run #38b (ball chain linking + GK proximity + trajectory).
